s2.ptxt: Install the 2 wiper rubber backing plates to the wiper rubber.

item.ptxt: Align the protrusions on the wiper rubber with the notches in the backing plates.
Align the curves of the backing plates with the curve of the glass.

s2.ptxt: Install the wiper rubber to the front wiper blade with the tip of the rubber (curved end) facing the axis of the wiper arm.

atten3.ptxt: Firmly push the wiper rubber into the wiper blade to securely engage them.

s2.ptxt: Install the front wiper blade as shown in the illustration.
Engage the holder of the front wiper blade.
